name: Portal Fantasy
short_description: Journey through an epic storyline, collecting creatures to aid you in turn-based battles, avoiding traps and solving puzzles, completing thrilling quests, and uncovering the darker history of Pyli Kingdom in this RPG with a unique modern take on a classic beloved genre.
detailed_description:
Roadmap


Developer Notes

The game is playable offline.

On your first run, your system may request a connection permission (it will be labelled as Portal Fantasy or, in some cases, js.node). This connection is used for current features that require online verification with our servers, such as redeeming referral codes and painting Porbles, as well as for future features like PvP.

You can choose to reject this connection, and the game will still run, though without access to the features mentioned above.

Please note: the first run after installing the game or after a major update may take slightly longer than usual.


About the Game

Explore, Capture, Battle

Prepare for an epic adventure collecting Porbles to aid you in turn-based battles in this pixel-art RPG. Fuse your Porbles to enhance, customize, and evolve them to their higher Majesty levels! 

Collect & Fuse

Collect unique creatures, Porbles, and gather ingredients to fuse and enhance your team. Discover hundreds of combinations, which can augment your creatures, teach them new skills and even change their appearances.

Turn-based Strategic Battles

Master strategic battles with unique passives that trigger based on your team composition. Manage your creatures’ momentum as you unleash their skills to victory. Build a superior squad and enhance your team's synergy and strength with each Porble's unique passive that works together in combat.

Explore a Beautiful Kingdom

Journey through beautiful pixelated worlds, navigating perils, solving quests, and meeting with countless quirky characters. A captivating story, tons of side content and quests, and a charming soundtrack await you on your adventures.

Solve Perilous Puzzles

Prove your mettle by tackling traps, puzzles and obstacles. The Wilderness is a dangerous place, as you jump and maneuver across moving platforms, voids, spikes, saws, turrets, teleporters and more.

Customise your Character

Fully customize your character’s appearance and fit them with an ever-expanding wardrobe of cute, quirky and fun outfits.

The Story

It has been 1000 years since the War of the Goddesses - Ravenna is dead, and the Pyli Kingdom has become prosperous once again. Or so it seems. As a novice at the prestigious Porble Academy, life takes an unexpected twist when you arrive late in Valeria, the capital.

Assigned trivial tasks by an unassuming assistant, little do you know that this journey will take you into something more sinister. Mysterious organizations, corrupted Porbles, and an ancient adversary await. Across Pyli Kingdom's diverse realms, you'll uncover a darker history than legends tell.

Each step peels away deeper mysteries, each revelation inches you closer to the truth. The burning question: will you survive the lurking secrets?

supported_languages: English, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Portugal
